visual_findings.label: Facial Expression
visual_findings.summary: Consistent, engaged facial expressions with smiling and attentive gaze during interview.
visual_findings.evidence: The patient maintains eye contact with the interviewer, smiles frequently, and exhibits natural facial movement during speech.

visual_findings.label: Gaze and Attention
visual_findings.summary: Patient demonstrates sustained attention and appropriate visual engagement with the interviewer.
visual_findings.evidence: Patient consistently looks toward the camera/interviewer, with no signs of distraction or disengagement.

voice_findings.label: Speech Fluency
voice_findings.summary: Speech is fluent, with natural pacing and appropriate pauses.
voice_findings.evidence: No hesitations, repetitions, or disfluencies observed during spoken responses.

voice_findings.label: Vocal Tone and Pitch
voice_findings.summary: Vocal tone is steady and modulated, consistent with a young adult speaker.
voice_findings.evidence: No signs of vocal tremor, monotony, or excessive pitch variation.

content_findings.label: Cognitive Content
content_findings.summary: Patient provides coherent, contextually relevant responses about race strategy, team dynamics, and personal performance.
content_findings.evidence: Responses demonstrate understanding of past events, future goals, and team roles, with no evidence of memory lapses or disorientation.

content_findings.label: Language Comprehension
content_findings.summary: Patient accurately comprehends and responds to complex interview questions.
content_findings.evidence: Patient answers multi-part questions about strategy, team cohesion, and personal growth with detailed, relevant answers.

screening_summary: The patient demonstrates fluent speech, coherent content, appropriate emotional expression, and sustained attention during the interview. No observable signs of cognitive impairment are present in this single clip.
evidence_against_risk: No speech disfluencies or memory lapses observed
Coherent, contextually appropriate responses to complex questions
Consistent eye contact and positive affect
alternative_explanations: The patient may be a young athlete in a post-competition interview setting, which may influence tone and energy levels.
emotional_assessment_findings: Positive affect with frequent smiling and engaged expression
Apparent enthusiasm and confidence during interview
risk_control_suggestions: Continue routine monitoring in the context of athletic performance and personal development.
No further cognitive screening indicated based on this clip alone.
visit_recommendation: Routine follow-up or no further action required.
future_risk_trend_summary: Insufficient data to predict future cognitive risk from a single clip.
context_notes: Target patient is clearly identifiable as the primary speaker in the interview.
Clip is not a formal cognitive screening test but a post-competition interview.
No signs of cognitive impairment observed in this short, focused interaction.
disclaimer: Research demo only. This output is not a diagnosis and must not be used as a standalone medical decision.
